overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through the historic city of Saint Denis, transitioning from a narrow alley through courtyards and cobblestone streets to a bustling market square.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley between brick buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow alleyway following an NPC companion

notable_agents.action: male NPC in blue shirt and dark vest walking ahead of ego toward the courtyard exit

entered.detail: tall dark brick wall forming the left boundary of the narrow alley
tall dark brick wall forming the right boundary with weathered texture
wooden ladder leaning against the right wall
stacked wooden crates and boxes along the right wall
stone archway at the end of the alley leading to a brighter courtyard

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow enclosed alleyway between dark brick walls. The character follows an NPC companion toward a stone archway exit visible in the distance. Wooden crates and a ladder line the right wall, while diffused natural light filters down from above.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner courtyard with stone paving leading to historic street

events.description: exits narrow alley through stone archway into sunlit courtyard with tree and stone paving
passes through second archway from courtyard onto cobblestone street with church view

agents.ego_description: ascending stone steps and walking through the courtyard toward the street exit

entered.detail: open courtyard area with uneven stone paving and scattered debris
mature tree with green foliage growing in the center of the courtyard
short flight of stone steps leading up from the alley to the courtyard level
large stone church with arched windows and Gothic architectural details
black wrought iron fence along the church property boundary

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dark alley into a bright sunlit courtyard featuring a large central tree and stone paving. After crossing the courtyard and ascending steps, the character passes through another archway onto a cobblestone street beside a historic stone church with an iron fence.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city street with tram tracks and horse-drawn traffic

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the cobblestone street from left to right
ego turns slightly right to follow the sidewalk curve along the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the cobblestone street sidewalk, observing the historic architecture and passing traffic

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with white horse moving along the street

entered.detail: wide street paved with uneven cobblestones featuring embedded tram tracks
tall wooden telegraph/utility poles lining the street with crossbars
brick wall covered with colorful vintage theater and show posters
building with painted sign reading 'R. JOURDAN & SONS WHEELWRIGHT'
wooden barrels and crates stacked outside the wheelwright shop

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sunlit cobblestone street beside a historic church, the character passes horse-drawn carriages and vintage theater posters on the walls. The street features embedded tram tracks and wooden utility poles, with the camera following the sidewalk as it curves gently to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with storefronts and wooden awnings

events.description: steps under covered sidewalk with wooden awning protection from the sun
navigates past pedestrians on the narrow covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk passing storefronts with green shutters and wooden benches

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue shirt walking opposite direction along the covered walk

entered.detail: wooden awning extending over the sidewalk providing shade
storefronts with green painted shutters and wooden doors
simple wooden benches placed outside the storefronts
decorative wrought iron balconies on upper floors of buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks under a covered sidewalk with wooden awnings, passing storefronts with green shutters and wooden benches. The lighting becomes mixed as the character moves in and out of shadow, navigating past opposing pedestrians while tram tracks run parallel on the street to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market square with vendor stalls and central fountain

events.description: passes through brick archway into the open market square
market stalls with canvas awnings and produce crates become prominent in the square

agents.ego_description: entering the bustling market square through the archway, approaching the central fountain area

notable_agents.action: bearded vendor in suspenders standing near the market entrance archway

entered.detail: arched brick entranceway with weathered yellow bricks marking the market boundary
vendor stalls covered with white canvas awnings displaying goods
large ornate fountain with statue in the center of the market square
wooden crates and barrels containing produce and goods for sale
multiple canvas canopies providing shade for market vendors

segments.scene_description: Passing through a brick archway, the character enters a bustling open market square filled with vendor stalls under canvas awnings. The scene opens up to full sunlight revealing a central fountain statue, produce crates, and scattered pedestrians browsing the market goods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, dim alleyway into the expansive, sun-drenched bustle of a city market square. It begins within a narrow corridor of dark brick walls and wooden crates, following a companion toward a distant stone archway. As the character emerges from the shadows, the scene opens into a bright courtyard with a central tree before transitioning through another archway onto a cobblestone street lined by a historic stone church and vintage theater posters. The camera then glides along a curving sidewalk under wooden awnings, moving through alternating patches of light and shadow past green-shuttered storefronts and tram tracks. Finally, the view passes through a brick archway to reveal a wide, sunlit market square filled with canvas vendor stalls and a central fountain statue.
